R1.label: Max Complacency
R1.detail: Low COR1M + steep contango — buy the umbrella while sunny

R2.label: Early Warning
R2.detail: Low COR1M + front flattening/inverting — watch closely

R3.label: Regime Turn
R3.detail: Rising COR1M + contango compressing — risk-off ramping

R4.label: Post-Shock
R4.detail: High COR1M + backwardation — shock already happened

presets.name: Champion
presets.desc: Most absolute return — fire on R3 + R4 only. 26 trades, +$39k, MAR 6.5.

presets.name: Sweet Spot
presets.desc: Best risk/reward. R4-only at -0.30 delta. 56% WR, +$34.6k, MAR 22.

presets.name: Risk-Adjusted
presets.desc: Tiny drawdown (~$480). Cheap puts at -0.10 delta, R4 only. MAR 51.

presets.name: Baseline (article)
presets.desc: Article's default: threshold 8.25, delta -0.20, no regime filter.

presets.name: Broad (no R1)
presets.desc: Wide trigger but skip R1 bleed days. 130 trades, less concentrated.
